label: EPI2ME Labs Bacterial Genomes
recommended_when: You want an ONT-curated local workflow for bacterial isolate assembly and polishing.
The nearest internal isolate backend is informative, but you want a more general ONT-maintained workflow shell.
avoid_when: The main task is environmental shotgun metagenomics or cloud-first pathogen discovery.

label: EPI2ME Labs Metagenomics
recommended_when: You want an ONT-curated local metagenomics workflow with standard reporting and reproducible defaults.
The internal example is useful, but you need a more generic ONT-maintained metagenomics workflow.
avoid_when: The route is primarily amplicon-focused or single-isolate assembly.

label: EPI2ME Labs 16S or amplicon workflows
recommended_when: You want an ONT-maintained amplicon workflow reference alongside the nearest internal 12S example.
The internal example is directionally useful, but you need a more generic ONT amplicon starting point.
avoid_when: The route is shotgun metagenomics or isolate assembly.

label: CZ ID long-read metagenomics
recommended_when: You want cloud-based long-read metagenomic interpretation for a route the group repo does not cover exactly.
You need a secondary external reference when the nearest internal example is only approximate.
avoid_when: The route is isolate assembly or a small targeted amplicon assay.
